assertions.evidence: test_fused_p2p_gemv.py PASS (exit code 0). Fused P2P reduce 1.68x faster than standard P2P in raw allreduce microbenchmark (61.1 us vs 102.5 us). Fused P2P serial mode: 14.39 tok/s vs 13.24 tok/s serial (+1.09x).

Performance: Serial=13.24 tok/s, Combined=33.40 tok/s, Fused=14.39 tok/s, Fused+Combined=32.73 tok/s. Fused+Combined vs Combined: 0.980x (within 5% threshold). VAL-ADV-001: PASS.
